summary: Verified the per-kilo cost self-heal fix on Warehouse Manufacturing page for the seeded demo product 'مايونيز (عرض الإصلاح)'. The card now correctly displays 48,334 IQD total cost after waste with 'لكل كغم: 1,611 IQD' (NOT the old stale 6,905 IQD). Yield banner shows '30.000 كغم' (actual produced quantity), not the stale 7. Per-unit price 1,611 IQD. Regression: existing non-produced products still compute per-unit cost via recipe yield correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: WarehouseManufacturing.js is very large (>3500 lines) — consider splitting product card, manufacturing dialogs, and cost breakdown into separate components to improve maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Primary fix verified for مايونيز scenario. Demo product 'مايونيز (عرض الإصلاح)' (id=demo-stale-mayo) on /warehouse-manufacturing -> tab-manufacturing shows correct per-kilo cost 1,611 IQD derived from 48,334 ÷ 30. Stale actual_recipe_yield=7 is no longer used for denominator. PRODUCE FLOW (creating a brand new product and producing it) was not exercised end-to-end since primary regression scenario was sufficient and backend tests already cover it (test_stale_yield_self_heal.py).

verification_evidence.card_text_extract: مايونيز (عرض الإصلاح) | المتبقي: 30 كغم | إجمالي المُصنّع: 30كغم | 📐 العائد (الكمية المُصنّعة): 30.000 كغم | مُصنّع فعلياً: 30.000 كغم | الكلفة قبل الهدر: 45,528 IQD لكل كغم: 1,518 IQD | ⭐ الكلفة بعد الهدر: 48,334 IQD لكل كغم: 1,611 IQD | سعر القطعة الواحدة: 1,611 IQD حسب الخلطة · لكل كغم
